name: Three in One
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>三</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>さん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>位</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>み</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>一</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>いっ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>体</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>たい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: During your opponent's End Phase, if your opponent has more total cards in their hand and field than you have in your hand and field: Special Summon 3 Normal Monsters from your GY. You can banish this card from your GY, then target 3 Monster Cards you control with different original names; Set 1 Spell/Trap from your hand or Deck that mentions the original names of all 3 targets.
eff: During your opponent's End Phase, if your opponent has more total cards in their hand and field than you have in your hand and field: Special Summon 3 Normal Monsters from your GY. You can banish this card from your GY, then target 3 Monster Cards you control with different original names; Set 1 Spell/Trap from your hand or Deck that mentions the original names of all 3 targets.

banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
